headline: Willful Patent Infringement Verdict Might Change The Case For Investing In Amgen (AMGN)
summary: In June 2026, a Delaware jury ruled that Amgen and its subsidiary Teneobio willfully infringed Harbour BioMed’s Grosveld patent, awarding Harbour US$20,203,704 in damages with the option to seek a tripling of that amount. The verdict, in one of the most closely watched antibody technology patent disputes, highlights legal and financial exposure around Amgen’s antibody discovery platforms and broader IP posture. We’ll now examine how this willful infringement verdict and potential higher...
